account.title: Trading Accounts
account.propTradingDesc: Get funded up to $200,000. Keep up to 80% of profits.
account.buyChallengeDesc: Buy a challenge to start your prop trading journey
account.createRealDesc: Create your first real trading account to start trading
account.createDemoDesc: Create a demo account to practice trading

support.title: Support
support.subject: Subject
support.faqDepositQ: How long does a deposit take?
support.faqDepositA: Deposits are usually processed within 24 hours after verification.
support.faqWithdrawA: Go to Wallet → Withdraw and follow the instructions. Withdrawals are processed within 1-3 business days.
support.faqMinDepositA: The minimum deposit depends on your account type. Check Account Types for details.
support.faqIbQ: How do I become an IB?
support.faqIbA: Go to the IB section and click "Apply Now" to submit your application.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.learnHow: Learn how to use our platform
instructions.createAccountDesc: Sign up with your email and complete the verification process.
instructions.completeKycDesc: Submit your identity documents for verification. This is required for deposits and withdrawals.
instructions.createTradingAccountDesc: Go to Account section and create a new trading account. Choose your preferred account type.
instructions.fundAccountDesc: Deposit funds to your wallet and transfer to your trading account.
instructions.makingDepositDesc: Go to Wallet → Deposit. Select your payment method, enter the amount, and follow the instructions.
instructions.depositProcessingDesc: Deposits are usually processed within 24 hours after admin verification.
instructions.makingWithdrawalDesc: Go to Wallet → Withdraw. Enter the amount and your payment details. Minimum withdrawal may apply.
instructions.withdrawalProcessingDesc: Withdrawals are processed within 1-3 business days after approval.
instructions.openingTradeDesc: Select an instrument, set your volume (lot size), and click Buy or Sell to open a market order.
instructions.pendingOrdersDesc: Use pending orders (Limit/Stop) to enter the market at a specific price.
instructions.slTpDesc: Set SL/TP to automatically close your trade at a certain profit or loss level.
instructions.closingTradeDesc: Click the X button on your open position to close it at the current market price.
instructions.understandingMarginDesc: Margin is the amount required to open a position. It depends on your leverage and position size.
instructions.whatIsCopyTradingDesc: Copy trading allows you to automatically copy trades from experienced traders (Masters).
instructions.followingMasterDesc: Go to Copytrade → Discover Masters. Select a master and click Follow.
instructions.copySettingsDesc: Choose Fixed Lot (same lot size for all trades) or Lot Multiplier (proportional to master).
instructions.commissionDesc: Masters charge a commission on profitable days only. This is deducted automatically.
instructions.managingSubscriptionsDesc: You can pause, resume, or stop following a master at any time.
instructions.whatIsIbDesc: Introducing Broker (IB) program lets you earn commissions by referring traders.
instructions.becomingIbDesc: Go to IB section and click Apply Now. Your application will be reviewed by admin.
instructions.referralLinkDesc: Once approved, you get a unique referral link. Share it to invite new traders.
instructions.commissionStructureDesc: Earn commission on every trade your referrals make. Up to 5 levels of referrals.
instructions.withdrawingCommissionDesc: Your IB earnings are credited to your IB wallet. You can withdraw anytime.
instructions.passwordSecurityDesc: Use a strong password with letters, numbers, and symbols. Change it regularly.
instructions.twoFactorAuthDesc: Enable 2FA for an extra layer of security on your account.
instructions.tradingPinDesc: Your trading account has a 4-digit PIN. Never share it with anyone.
instructions.suspiciousActivityDesc: If you notice any suspicious activity, contact support immediately.

copytrade.title: Copy Trading
copytrade.becomeMasterDesc: Share your trades and earn commission
copytrade.noMastersDesc: Check back later for trading experts to follow
copytrade.noSubscriptions: You're not following any masters yet
copytrade.noTradesDesc: Follow a master trader to start copying trades
copytrade.noFollowersDesc: Share your profile to attract followers

ib.title: IB Program
ib.becomeIbDesc: Earn commissions by referring traders. Get up to 5 levels of referral commissions!
ib.benefit1: Earn commission on every trade your referrals make
ib.applicationPendingDesc: Your IB application is under review. You will be notified once approved.
ib.applicationRejectedDesc: Unfortunately, your IB application was not approved.
ib.shareLink: Share your referral link to start earning commissions
